svg.title: Enterprise ERP/CRM — complete module architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing all platform modules: infrastructure layer, three domain columns (Operations, Core ERP, Finance and Admin), cross-cutting services, and database layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Laravel Passport handle multi-tenant OAuth2 authentication in this ERP platform?')
sendPrompt('How does Laravel Reverb power real-time features like stock alerts and live dashboards in this ERP?')
sendPrompt('How is L5 Swagger integrated for API documentation across all ERP modules?')
sendPrompt('Show me the procurement module in detail — PO flow, GRN, purchase lines, and AP journal entries')
sendPrompt('Show me the sales module in detail — SO flow, delivery, AR journal entries, and pricing')
sendPrompt('Explain the full returns management system — purchase returns, sales returns, partial returns, batch-aware handling, credit memos')
sendPrompt('How does payment processing work — AP/AR settlement, credit memos, bank integration?')
sendPrompt('Explain order management — pricing engine, tax calculation, discounts, and order lifecycle')
sendPrompt('Show me the product management module — physical, service, digital, combo, and variable products with variants and UoM')
sendPrompt('Show me the inventory module in detail — stock tracking, batch/lot/serial, ledger, movements, adjustments')
sendPrompt('Explain the warehouse and location hierarchy — multi-location, zone/rack/bin, hierarchical structure')
sendPrompt('How does multi-UoM work — per-variant conversions, purchase UoM vs sales UoM, and the product_uom_conversions table')
sendPrompt('Explain inventory valuation methods — FIFO, LIFO, FEFO, AVCO, and how they affect journal entries')
sendPrompt('Show me the accounting module — chart of accounts, journal entries, double-entry, Balance Sheet, P&L')
sendPrompt('Explain the CRM and party management module — suppliers, customers, contacts, party addresses')
sendPrompt('Explain financial reporting — Balance Sheet, Profit and Loss, cash flow, bank reconciliation')
sendPrompt('How does audit and compliance work — immutable logs, change tracking, who changed what and when')
sendPrompt('What configuration and settings does the ERP platform support at tenant and module level?')
sendPrompt('Explain the barcode system — EAN, UPC, Code128, QR, GS1 compatibility, and how barcodes are generated and scanned')
sendPrompt('How does the traceability ledger work — forward trace, backward trace, scan-based operations, and the trace_logs table')
sendPrompt('How does the event-driven architecture work — domain events, listeners, queues, and real-time broadcasting')
sendPrompt('How do file attachments work across ERP entities using multipart/form-data?')
sendPrompt('How does multi-tenancy work — tenant isolation, scoped queries, shared infrastructure, and row-level security')

g.text: Normalized database · 3NF/BCNF · migrations per module · ACID · tenant-scoped queries
